message:
feat(observability): add lock-free resource accounting (bd-3fp4g)

Add ResourceAccounting for per-kind obligation lifecycle tracking,
budget consumption, admission control, and high-water marks using
fixed-size atomic arrays indexed by ObligationKind/AdmissionKind
discriminant. Zero hot-path allocations, monotone counters with
Relaxed ordering, CAS-loop peak tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
